inputs.label: Slope Angle
inputs.businessContext: Angle of the snowboarding slope relative to horizontal.

inputs.label: Friction Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of kinetic friction between snowboard and snow.

inputs.label: Rider + Board Mass
inputs.businessContext: Total mass of the snowboarder and equipment.

formulas.finalVelocity: Math.sqrt(2 * (9.81 * (Math.sin(slopeAngle * Math.PI / 180) - frictionCoeff * Math.cos(slopeAngle * Math.PI / 180))) * slopeLength)
formulas.travelTime: Math.sqrt(2 * slopeLength / (9.81 * (Math.sin(slopeAngle * Math.PI / 180) - frictionCoeff * Math.cos(slopeAngle * Math.PI / 180))))
formulas.kineticEnergy: 0.5 * mass * (2 * (9.81 * (Math.sin(slopeAngle * Math.PI / 180) - frictionCoeff * Math.cos(slopeAngle * Math.PI / 180))) * slopeLength)
